current_task: Create a Word file with one sentence
knowledge_need: The agent does not know what a Word file/docx is, what components are needed to create one, and how to validate that knowledge before trying the task.
already_checked: active memory has no executable docx creation method; reflex registry has read-only file/json/repo/memory reflexes only; repo has no confirmed docx creation reflex yet
candidate_knowledge: CODEX_DRAFT: A .docx Word file is an Office Open XML ZIP package, not plain text. For a minimal one-sentence document, the package needs [Content_Types].xml, _rels/.rels, and word/document.xml containing the sentence inside WordprocessingML paragraph/run/text elements. Optional but common parts include docProps/core.xml, docProps/app.xml, and word/styles.xml. The safest creation route is to use an existing docx library if available; otherwise generate the minimal OOXML files and zip them with correct paths and XML namespaces.
missing_concepts: A .docx is a ZIP container with required internal paths
How to encode text safely in XML
How to verify a generated file is a valid ZIP and valid docx structure
suggested_decomposition: Define the exact sentence to place in the document
Choose creation method: existing docx library preferred; manual OOXML zip only if no library exists
Create minimal document.xml with one paragraph containing one text run
Zip the internal files into a .docx with correct relative paths
Validate structure before considering task attempted
validation_needed: Confirm file is a readable ZIP archive
Confirm _rels/.rels points to word/document.xml as the main office document
Confirm word/document.xml contains the exact requested sentence
If possible, open with Microsoft Word, LibreOffice, or a docx parser and confirm no repair warning
return_to_task_hint: Before creating the Word file, teach or add a small docx creation reflex that either calls a known library or writes the minimal OOXML package, then run a structural validation reflex on a tiny test sentence.
limits: Advisory CODEX_DRAFT only. No files inspected, created, modified, or validated here. This does not decide the agent route and is not proof that the local repo already supports docx creation.
boundary: CODEX_DRAFT only; agent must validate before acting.
